message:
refactor(tests): replace panic! with Result returns for better diagnostics

Convert tests that use panic! for unexpected errors to return Result
types instead. This provides several benefits:

1. Better error messages - actual error variants are returned rather
   than generic panic strings
2. More idiomatic Rust - tests that can fail return Result<(), E>
3. Compiler-assisted exhaustiveness - match arms must handle all cases

Files updated:

src/bundler/github.rs:
  - parse_repo_rejects_invalid: Returns Result, propagates MsError
  - parse_repo_rejects_extra_segments: Returns Result, propagates MsError
  - select_asset_requires_single_msb: Returns Result, propagates MsError

src/core/disclosure.rs:
  - test_optimal_disclosure_explicit: Returns Result<(), String>
  - test_optimal_disclosure_pack_budget: Returns Result<(), String>
  - test_optimal_disclosure_low_tokens: Returns Result<(), String>
  - test_optimal_disclosure_direct_request: Returns Result<(), String>

src/core/packing.rs:
  - test_mandatory_budget_failure: Returns Result<(), PackError>
    Uses matches! macro for cleaner pattern matching

This pattern ensures test failures provide actionable error information
rather than opaque panic messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
